daily.today_energy: Your vibe is introspective but magnetic—people are drawn to your authenticity today. Channel this energy into meaningful conversations rather than surface-level small talk. Trust your gut.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, deeper connection is calling. Single? Someone's noticing your quiet confidence. Don't overthink it; just show up as yourself and see what unfolds naturally.
daily.career: Your creative problem-solving is on point right now. This is the energy to pitch that idea or tackle something you've been avoiding. Your perspective hits different today.
daily.health: Your mind needs grounding as much as your body. Consider moving in ways that feel good—whether that's dancing, walking, or stretching. Mental clarity follows when you're in tune with yourself.

weekly.overview: This week invites you to embrace your weird and wonderful self, Aquarius. The cosmic energy supports your authentic expression and creative breakthroughs. Trust the timing of things unfolding naturally.
weekly.love: There's a magnetism to your energy right now that draws people in. Whether single or coupled, lean into genuine conversations. Real connection happens when you stop overthinking and just vibe.
weekly.career: Your unique perspective is your superpower this week. Don't dim your light to fit in. Pitch that unconventional idea or approach a project differently—your innovative thinking is exactly what's needed.
weekly.health: Your mind feels restless and curious. Channel that energy into exploring new wellness practices or activities that spark joy. Movement, creativity, and social time will feel particularly nourishing.
